user_request: Find industrial design inspiration references for a travel-friendly manual coffee grinder with compact nesting geometry, knurled metal details, and premium tactile controls.

evaluation.design_direction_summary: Compact, utilitarian cylindrical product with ribbed grip surfaces, restrained premium CMF, and a travel-ready industrial look that feels mechanically credible.
strengths: Strong compact cylindrical form that suggests portability
Ribbed/knurled-looking surface treatment adds tactile character
Premium restrained color palette with dark body and light metallic base
Clear mechanical/industrial aesthetic suitable for coffee gear inspiration
Simple vertical detailing gives a clean, tool-like identity
Hand scale communicates manageable size and ergonomic intent
weaknesses: Visible product branding makes it less neutral as a pure reference
Form is relatively generic and not especially novel
No obvious nesting or collapsing geometry shown
Limited evidence of premium control interfaces beyond the external crank
Surface detail is somewhat uniform and may read as more consumer appliance than high-end design object
Image is a lifestyle shot, so product edges and mechanisms are not fully legible
